name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ AutoTrader connects to your brokerage account and executes
conservative, automated trading strategies on your behalf.

How it works:
1. Connect your brokerage account
2. Review the default strategy settings
3. Activate trading — the bot handles the rest

You'll get real-time notifications for every trade and can
pause or adjust settings at any time.

Tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
